Class MarketController

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI.Controllers.MarketController
All Implemented Interfaces:
GUIObserver
public class MarketController extends Object implements GUIObserver
JavaFX controller for the market panel. Displays the current top and bottom rows of cards and buildings, handles draw/buy actions, and keeps the view in sync with server updates.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MarketController(ClientVirtualView clientHandler, ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Creates a new market controller and registers this observer with the client view.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    initialize()
    Called by FXMLLoader after all @FXML fields are injected.
    void
    onActionAvailableChanged(int drawTop, int drawBot)
    Called when the available actions for the current player change (number of draws from the top and bottom rows).
    void
    onAskExtraDraw(List<CardDTO> cards, List<BuildingDTO> buildings)
    Called when the server asks the local player to draw an extra card at end of round.
    void
    onBoardInitialized(List<OffertileDTO> tiles, List<DefaultTileDTO> defs)
    Called when the board is initialized with offer tiles and default tiles.
    void
    onBottomBuildRemoved(int position)
    Called when a building is removed from the bottom market row.
    void
    onBottomCardRemoved(int position)
    Called when a tribe card is removed from the bottom market row.
    void
    onCardAddedToTribe(String nickname, CardDTO card)
    Called when a card is added to a player's tribe.
    void
    onDefaultTileOrderChanged(List<PlayerDTO> order)
    Called when the turn order of players on the default tile changes.
    void
    onError(String message)
    Called when the server sends an error message.
    void
    onEventResolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
    Called when a game event is resolved.
    void
    onGamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE phase)
    Called when the game phase changes.
    void
    onMarketInitialized(List<CardDTO> top, List<CardDTO> bot, List<BuildingDTO> topBld, List<BuildingDTO> botBld)
    Called when the market is initialized with the initial card lists.
    void
    onPlayerAdded(PlayerDTO player)
    Called when a new player joins the game.
    void
    onPlayerDisconnected(String nickname)
    Called when a player disconnects from the game.
    void
    onPlayerFoodChanged(String n, int f)
    Called when a player's food reserve changes.
    void
    onPlayerPlacedOnOfferTile(String nickname, int tilePosition, int fromSlot)
    Called when a player places their totem on an offer tile.
    void
    onPlayerPPChanged(String n, int p)
    Called when a player's Prestige Points change.
    void
    onPlayerReconnected(String nickname)
    Called when a player reconnects to the game.
    void
    onPlayerToPlaceChanged(String nickname)
    Called when the active player for the placing phase changes.
    void
    onPlayerToPlayChanged(String nickname)
    Called when the active player for the action phase (card selection) changes.
    void
    onRankReceived(Map<Integer, List<String>> leaderboards)
    Called when the server returns the global leaderboard.
    void
    onServerDead()
    Called when loss of connection to the server is detected.

    Called at end of round when the top-row buildings are refreshed.

    Called when a building is removed from the top market row.
    void
    onTopCardRefreshed(List<CardDTO> top)
    Called at end of round when the top-row tribe cards are refreshed.
    void
    onTopCardRemoved(int position)
    Called when a tribe card is removed from the top market row.
    void
    onWinners(List<PlayerDTO> w)
    Called when the game ends with the list of winners.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • MarketController

      public MarketController(ClientVirtualView clientHandler, ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, PlayerDTO playerDTO)
      Creates a new market controller and registers this observer with the client view.
      Parameters:
      clientHandler - the local client view that receives notifications from the server.
      serverRemoteInterface - the remote server interface used to send game actions.
      playerDTO - the local player DTO associated with this session.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Called by FXMLLoader after all @FXML fields are injected. Flushes any pending data.

    • onGamePhaseChanged

      public void onGamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE phase)
      Called when the game phase changes. Updates the phase label and clears totems from offer tiles at the start of each placing phase.
      Specified by:
      onGamePhaseChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      phase - the new game phase.

    • onPlayerToPlaceChanged

      public void onPlayerToPlaceChanged(String nickname)
      Called when the active player for the placing phase changes. Updates the current-player label and recalculates the interaction state.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerToPlaceChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player who must now place their totem.

    • onPlayerToPlayChanged

      public void onPlayerToPlayChanged(String nickname)
      Called when the active player for the action phase (card selection) changes. Updates the current-player label and recalculates the interaction state.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerToPlayChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player who must now perform their action.

    • onMarketInitialized

      public void onMarketInitialized(List<CardDTO> top, List<CardDTO> bot, List<BuildingDTO> topBld, List<BuildingDTO> botBld)
      Called when the market is initialized with the initial card lists. If the FXML component is not yet ready, the data is buffered.
      Specified by:
      onMarketInitialized in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      top - initial tribe cards for the top row.
      bot - initial tribe cards for the bottom row.
      topBld - initial buildings for the top row.
      botBld - initial buildings for the bottom row.

    • onTopCardRemoved

      public void onTopCardRemoved(int position)
      Called when a tribe card is removed from the top market row. Animates the removal and updates the interaction state.
      Specified by:
      onTopCardRemoved in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      position - the zero-based index of the removed card in the top row.

    • onBottomCardRemoved

      public void onBottomCardRemoved(int position)
      Called when a tribe card is removed from the bottom market row. Animates the removal and updates the interaction state.
      Specified by:
      onBottomCardRemoved in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      position - the zero-based index of the removed card in the bottom row.

    • onTopBuildRemoved

      public void onTopBuildRemoved(int position)
      Called when a building is removed from the top market row. Animates the removal of the corresponding node in the top HBox.
      Specified by:
      onTopBuildRemoved in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      position - the zero-based index of the removed building among the top-row buildings.

    • onBottomBuildRemoved

      public void onBottomBuildRemoved(int position)
      Called when a building is removed from the bottom market row. Animates the removal of the corresponding node in the bottom HBox.
      Specified by:
      onBottomBuildRemoved in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      position - the zero-based index of the removed building among the bottom-row buildings.

    • onTopCardRefreshed

      public void onTopCardRefreshed(List<CardDTO> top)
      Called at end of round when the top-row tribe cards are refreshed. Old cards fly downward with an animation before the new ones appear. If an extra-draw is active, the bottom-row update is deferred.
      Specified by:
      onTopCardRefreshed in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      top - the new list of tribe cards for the top row.

    • onTopBuildingRefreshed

      public void onTopBuildingRefreshed(List<BuildingDTO> topBld)
      Called at end of round when the top-row buildings are refreshed. Old buildings fly downward with an animation before the new ones appear. If an extra-draw is active, the bottom-row update is deferred.
      Specified by:
      onTopBuildingRefreshed in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      topBld - the new list of buildings for the top row.

    • onBoardInitialized

      public void onBoardInitialized(List<OffertileDTO> tiles, List<DefaultTileDTO> defs)
      Called when the board is initialized with offer tiles and default tiles. Tiles are rendered only once per session; subsequent calls are ignored.
      Specified by:
      onBoardInitialized in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      tiles - the list of offer tiles on the board.
      defs - the list of default tiles (one per player).

    • onPlayerPlacedOnOfferTile

      public void onPlayerPlacedOnOfferTile(String nickname, int tilePosition, int fromSlot)
      Called when a player places their totem on an offer tile. Animates the totem from the default tile to the chosen offer tile, or places it directly if the source overlay is not available.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerPlacedOnOfferTile in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player who placed the totem.
      tilePosition - the zero-based position of the occupied offer tile.
      fromSlot - the slot on the default tile from which the totem originates (-1 if unavailable).

    • onDefaultTileOrderChanged

      public void onDefaultTileOrderChanged(List<PlayerDTO> order)
      Called when the turn order of players on the default tile changes. Redraws the totems on the default tile according to the new turn order.
      Specified by:
      onDefaultTileOrderChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      order - the ordered list of players on the default tile (index = slot).

    • onActionAvailableChanged

      public void onActionAvailableChanged(int drawTop, int drawBot)
      Called when the available actions for the current player change (number of draws from the top and bottom rows).
      Specified by:
      onActionAvailableChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      drawTop - number of draws available from the top market row.
      drawBot - number of draws available from the bottom market row.

    • onPlayerAdded

      public void onPlayerAdded(PlayerDTO player)
      Called when a new player joins the game. Delegates to the default interface implementation.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerAdded in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      player - the DTO of the added player.

    • onError

      public void onError(String message)
      Called when the server sends an error message. Shows the error dialog on the JavaFX thread.
      Specified by:
      onError in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      message - the error text received from the server.

    • onPlayerDisconnected

      public void onPlayerDisconnected(String nickname)
      Called when a player disconnects from the game. Adds a disconnection entry to the player-status popup.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerDisconnected in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the disconnected player.

    • onPlayerReconnected

      public void onPlayerReconnected(String nickname)
      Called when a player reconnects to the game. Adds a reconnection entry to the player-status popup.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerReconnected in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the reconnected player.

    • onServerDead

      public void onServerDead()
      Called when loss of connection to the server is detected. Shows an error dialog and exits the application on close.
      Specified by:
      onServerDead in interface GUIObserver

    • onPlayerPPChanged

      public void onPlayerPPChanged(String n, int p)
      Called when a player's Prestige Points change. Updates the PP label only if the player is the local one.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerPPChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      n - the nickname of the player whose PP changed.
      p - the new Prestige Points value.

    • onPlayerFoodChanged

      public void onPlayerFoodChanged(String n, int f)
      Called when a player's food reserve changes. Updates the food label and recalculates interactions only for the local player.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerFoodChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      n - the nickname of the player whose food changed.
      f - the new food reserve value.

    • onCardAddedToTribe

      public void onCardAddedToTribe(String nickname, CardDTO card)
      Called when a card is added to a player's tribe. Updates the local player's stat labels if they are the affected player.
      Specified by:
      onCardAddedToTribe in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player who received the card.
      card - the DTO of the card added to the tribe.

    • onEventResolved

      public void onEventResolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
      Called when a game event is resolved. If an extra-draw is active, the notification is deferred; otherwise it appears immediately in the event popup.
      Specified by:
      onEventResolved in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      eventID - the unique ID of the resolved event.
      eventType - the type of the resolved event.

    • onAskExtraDraw

      public void onAskExtraDraw(List<CardDTO> cards, List<BuildingDTO> buildings)
      Called when the server asks the local player to draw an extra card at end of round. Replaces the top row with a snapshot of the available cards and shows the extra-draw banner.
      Specified by:
      onAskExtraDraw in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      cards - the tribe cards available for the extra selection.
      buildings - the buildings available for the extra selection.

    • onWinners

      public void onWinners(List<PlayerDTO> w)
      Called when the game ends with the list of winners. Loads and shows the end-game screen and requests the global leaderboard from the server.
      Specified by:
      onWinners in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      w - the list of winning players.

    • onRankReceived

      public void onRankReceived(Map<Integer, List<String>> leaderboards)
      Called when the server returns the global leaderboard. Filters entries for the current player count and passes them to the end-game controller.
      Specified by:
      onRankReceived in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      leaderboards - map from player count to the corresponding leaderboard rows.
